title: BTA Health Indicator
description: A health indicator mod for Better Than Adventure.
body:
# BTA Health Indicator
**This mod requires [HalpLibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe)**

A mod for Better Than Adventure that displays a customizable vanilla-esque health indicator above mobs the player is looking at.

![Health Indicator with default settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1421705c8e8878c784cfba5b1ad72264ab5fb2.png)
